chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 1917 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections 2. For Katcha Peshi 24.01.2018. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Asstt: A.G alongwith Inspector Manzoor Ali on behalf of DIG Hyderabad & SIP Muhammad Yaseen on behalf of SHO P.S.Matli -=-=- This petition is called for hearing, neither petitioner nor his counsel is present, no intimation is received. This petition has been filed on 31.08.2015, since then nobody on behalf of the petitioner is diligently pursing this petition. Since none is appearing on behalf of the petitioner and in this petition question of life and liberty of the petitioner is involved, therefore, we ourselves have gone through the contents of memo of petition and come to the conclusion that through this petition, the petitioner has sought relief for providing him protection to his life and property. Learned Asstt: A.G present in court alongwith police officials, submits that official respondents would act strictly in accordance with law. In view of the statement of learned Asstt: A.G, this petition is disposed of. However, official respondents are directed to make sure there should not be caused any harassment to the petitioner in violation of law and they shall act strictly in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE A.Rasheed
